headline: PFE Talzenna Combo Shows Strong Efficacy in Wider Prostate Cancer Use
summary: Pfizer's Talzenna/Xtandi combo meets phase III goals, significantly delaying disease progression in HRR-mutated metastatic castration-sensitive prostate cancer patients.

raw.headline: PFE Talzenna Combo Shows Strong Efficacy in Wider Prostate Cancer Use
raw.summary: Pfizer's Talzenna/Xtandi combo meets phase III goals, significantly delaying disease progression in HRR-mutated metastatic castration-sensitive prostate cancer patients.

headline: Earendil Labs Announces $787 Million in Financing to Scale AI-Driven Biologics Discovery and Development
summary: Earendil Labs, an AI-driven biotechnology company advancing next-generation biologics, today announced that it has raised $787 million in financing rounds. The investment included participation by a group of leading global investors, including Dimension Capital, DST Global, INCE Capital, Luminous Ventures, Miracle Capital, Sanofi, and Biotech Development Fund (created by Hillhouse and Pfizer), alongside other existing and new technology and healthcare-focused investors.
